headline: ILLINOIS TOOL WORKS (NYSE:ITW) Presents a Compelling Case for Dividend Dependability
summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) offers a reliable 2.22% dividend yield with a history of growth, backed by strong profitability and a solid financial foundation for income investors.
